2367.name: Rewards
2367.description: a) a simple chain flail It is an above average (1d9+2 damage), bludgeoning weapon, which can be wielded in one hand. Your class is unfamiliar with the use of a simple chain flail. b) a finely forged sword of steel It is an above average (1d10+2 damage), slashing weapon, which can be wielded in one hand. Your class is unfamiliar with the use of a finely forged sword of steel. c) a twisted oaken staff It is an above average (2d4+2 damage), bludgeoning weapon, which requires both hands. A two-handed stance makes it easier to land critical hits (+3% Critical). Its swing is straight and true. (+2 Attack) Your class is unfamiliar with the use of a twisted oaken staff. d) a serrated hunting knife It is a potent (2d6+1 damage), stabbing weapon, which can be wielded in one hand. It can also be used to backstab an opponent. e) a set of steel claws They are above average (3d4+0 damage), dual stabbing weapons, which requires both hands. Attacking with both hands increases your attack speed. (-10% Speed). 100 Obsidian 700 Experience
